transcript: Oh good! Listen, I’m gonna be revvin’ up my jackhammer. I just wanted to clear it with ya—make sure that was alright.
I’m gonna get my jackhammer, uh, cranked up here tonight, ma’am. It’s gonna make some loud volume. I just wanted to make sure that was okay… with ya.
Oh, you’re one of our neighbors?
Yeah, we’re your neighbor, uh-huh, yeah, uh-huh! I’m gonna plug it into your outlet out front, okay, with my extension cord; is that okay?
No, you aren’t. You aren’t. No.
Why not? Well I’m just gonna plug it in right now for a few minutes, okay?—
We don’t want you in our yard. [unclear, perhaps “We don’t know you”]—
Just for a couple minutes, okay? It’s not gonna be a big deal. I can give ya two, three dollars!
Dale who? Who is this? Where you from?
I’m from Solar Fantasies. I do solar panels.
I’m gonna be, uh… on the rooftops tomorrow. Gettin’ some measurements up there and—
Um… It’s— It’s too— It’s too late to be callin’, I’m—
No, I’m gonna be up there at 4 AM, guy—in the morning.
You’re gonna be what at 4 AM? On our roof?—
You ain’t gonna be on my roof at 4 AM—Shit!
Yes, I am. And I’ll let ya know how much it’s gonna—
Well come on down, man. I’ll beat the fuck outta you— I’ll throw ya right off that roof!
No, guy, I’m doin’ this as a favor!
Timmy, Timmy, Timmy. Hey, do me a favor— Would you… bring your receptacles and your bins, uh, closer to your house? They’re kinda an eye sore out here. Alright up ‘ere?—
I’m in the community and I don’t like what I see up here! Straighten it up a bit. You understand, am I makin’ sense, am I gettin’ thorough? [exhales] [delay]
Oh, my God! What a fuckin’ idiot you are!
Look, guy, just do us a favor and pick it up. Alright? Get out there and straighten it up.—
Pick up your bins, guy! Your garbage cans! It’s—
It’s a mess is what it is! Alright?
It’s too close to me. It’s too close to m—
—to my property line. And I don’t like what I see! [exhales] [delay]
What’s your property line? What’s your address?
You know doggone well my address is. Pick it up! You got it?
What’s it gonna take for me to get through to ya? Huh? What. Is. It. Going to take?—
I’ll get rid of it tomorrow morning.

[delay, reverb] “Tomorrow morning”? Oh, it’s— Oh, you’re full of excuses every time I turn around, eh?”Ohh… I’ll do it later. It’s not my problem.”You know, just get in gear, guy. Alright? ¿Comprende? or…?
Well if you come on my property then you better bring a body bag for yourself.
I’ll bring my horse whip if you try to give me any lip! [exhales] Then we’ll see who needs the bags then, tough guy, huh?
Come on over then! Bring a body bag! Go on! [laughs] I’d just love to do it!
I’ll bring my bull whip and take care o’ ya—one, two, three, splat! That’s it! End o’ story!—
Bring anything you want, scumbag! I’m waitin’.
Yeah, you’re gonna be layin’ on the sidewalk when I’m done with ya. I’m gonna roll ya into traffic! Whadda ya think of that one?
Hey, I’m—I’m doing well. How are you doin’?
What’re you doin’, guy? I’m supposed to meet you outside. What’re you doin’?
Yeh? Ring my fuckin’ bell, then. Come over already!
Hey man, can you cut it with the language? I’ve got my kid on the line, here.
You “got your kid on the line”? [laughs] Ring my fuckin’ bell!—
I’m gonna wring your neck, guy, is what I’m gonna do!
Wring my neck, then, ya little dickhead!
Yeah! Fuck you, scumbag! Ring my bell!—
What’re you prepared to do about it, there, guy?
Ring my bell and you’ll see! [laughs]
You’re gonna be seein’ stars, guy, once I’m done pummelin’ ya! Ya feel me?
Really? I’ve been seein’ stars when your daughter suckin’ my dick! [laughs]
I can see a black hole when I’m…
[stifled laughter] I’m gonna take care o’ ya real quick. I’m gonna take care o’ ya tonight!
[mockingly babbles]You’re all talk! You’re a piece of shit!—
[delay, pitch-shifted, speed-shifted]I’m gonna take care o’ ya real quick. I’m gonna take care o’ ya tonight!—
[mocking] “I’m gonna— I’m gonna [babbles]— lay you out!”
[delay, pitch-shifted, speed-shifted]I’m gonna take care o’ ya real quick. I’m gonna take care o’ ya tonight![quiet] …bunghole!I’m gonna lay ya out!—
Hey man, I think— I think you’re a pussy.
[delay, pitch-shifted, speed-shifted]…take care o’ ya real quick. I’m gonna take care o’ ya tonight!
I think you’re— I think you’re a pussy, man.
You think I’m a “pussy”?[mocking] “I’m gonna lay you out!”—
Yeah, I think you’re a pussy.—
[delay, pitch-shifted, speed-shifted]I’m gonna take care o’ ya real quick. I’m gonna take care o’ ya tonight!—
Yeah? Well come on over, dick head! You’re just a piece of shit!—
[delay, pitch-shifted, speed-shifted]I’m gonna lay ya out! [exhales]I’m gonna take care o’ ya real quick. I’m gonna take care o’ ya tonight!—
Yeah? No, you’re not outside ‘cause I’m outside.
So, uh… I need to get into a mystical pewter spiral… formation. [exhales]
Okay, and I need a spiral and some kinda gnome [exhales] made outta pewter.
Oh, I don’t think we have—
We have the gnome but it’s not made of pewter. The pewter, we have only dragons.
We have gnomes but not— Yeah, but not the dragon—just a statue made of, I think it’s resin.
[delay, pitch-shifted] Tell me about the m—Tell me about the gnome. I wanna know about the gnome up ‘ere. [exhales]
Do you have any kind of, ah, Pewter Overlord of some kind? [delay]
No, we have the… the pewter, but only dragons.
Oh, a dragon! Wow! I wanna get into a miniature liquefied gnome. [exhales] [delay, pitch-shifted]If I can get that from ya tonight—in the midnight hour?
Throw some Chinese stars at it?
Okay, um, can you… give me your phone number? I’ll send you the picture of what we have. ‘Kay? [unclear]—
Yeah, it’s, uh, eight-eight—five-seventy-four hundred. You bet. Have a good night, thank you. [delay, 8-second]
Good afternoon. Kevin’s Jewelers. Liz speaking. How can I help you?
Yeah, do you guys got any pewter up ‘ere? [exhales]
Hot Topic. This is Elaina. How can I help you?
Yeah, we got Kevin Jewelers on the line.
Kevin Jewelers is on the line? Um, you have Hot Topic—
I’m sorry, I don’t believe anything’s going on outside?
Yeah, I don’t see anything going on outside.
Oh, there’s microorganisms everywhere, young lady; did ya ever stop to contemplate that, or…?
Actually, I took a Microbiology in Food class, so I know a little bit more about that than you would. Uh, was there anything I could help you with Hot Topic-wise, hon’?—

[delay] Oh, is that so?Uh, yeah, I would like to talk about the section of the female avian reproductive tract where the shell is added to the egg; it’s also known as the “shell gland”… in, uh, the scrubfowl. If you wanna get into that—
Do you wanna talk about something, like, Hot Topic-wise, though? ‘Cause I— I do have some other things, if you just wanna talk about, like, microorganisms and stuff.
Well y—you’re the one who said you knew t—‘bout this, ‘bout that, ‘bout everything else. So let’s get in a little peafowl, scrubfowl!
Was there anything I can help you out with that was Hot Topic-related, though, hon’?
Uh, the windpipe of the— of the chicken. Ya know, chew on that! [delay]
Yeah, I was lookin’ for the pewter toad… that you guys got up ‘ere.
We don’t have pewter toad. We only have pewter with dragons.
The gnome is not pewter; it’s, uh, made of the resin.
”Raisin”! Oh, yeah! How ‘bout a three-dimensional mallard? [exhales]
Can you come to the store?
''[delay, reverb]’’ Yes, I’ll be… I’ll be there and, uh— So we’ll go over it in person, sure!
Yeah, uh… you have any Mule Bowel? On 7”?
Yeah, and they got a split EP with Goofy Loaf.
You know what I’m sayin’? So—
Good one. Good one. So have you ever heard of Longmont Potion Castle?
Um… yeah, don’t worry ‘bout it. Um, no Goofy Loaf or, um… [laughing] Mule Bowel. Yeah. Sorry ‘bout that.
Yeah, this is Tony. What’s up?—
Uh, hey, man! Yo, whadda ya doin’ tonight? [exhales]
What is this, the fuckin’… Longmont Potion Castle shit? [laughs]
What are you sayin’ there, guy?
Hey, are you ready to get tough?
Oh shit! Is this really the dude? Ay yo, but yo… hold up. Is this really the fool—? Is this really the fuckin’ Longmont fool or what?
What is up, my man?! What is up!?—
Wait, hold up, bro! Waitwaitwait, nah— The number— The number said it was comin’ from Denver and I know you’re from Denver.—
Aw hell no! Aww hell! Missed me with that bullshit, bud!
Ay bro, how’d you get—? How’d you get my number? [laughs]
Alright. Alright, bro. What’s up with Otis King, though, bro? What’s up with Otis King?
You ready to get tough? Check out my musculature…
I was thinking of heading out under the Neon Light tonight, whadda you say?
Yeah, bro! You should do it, bro!
Hey! Hey, bro! Hey, can you do me a favor?—
Please call me back in, like, uh… in, like, 15 minutes?
Call you back? What, are you busy or somethin’?
Yeah, yeah, I just got— I just gotta— Yeah, yeah! I gotta— gotta go to my.. my homie’s house real quick, but… Yeah, call me back, bro!
I’ll give it a shot, bud!
